utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Thus, each item includes costs and is specified. Therefore, all 5 are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items by plan name: PrimeCare Premium Package (Family) for health, EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel. In the ground-truth ratings, EliteHome Premium Coverage and EliteTravel Premium Plan match exactly and have ratings of 10 each. The health item name does not exactly match any listed plan. The closest match is PrimeCare Premium Plan (appearing under both physical and mental health, each rated 10). Given the description of comprehensive physical and mental health insurance with zero deductibles and dedicated support, it aligns with the PrimeCare Premium Plan. Therefore, map the health coverage to PrimeCare Premium Plan with rating 10, property to EliteHome Premium Coverage with rating 10, and travel to EliteTravel Premium Plan with rating 10.
